[13/01/23, 07.32.59] Dani Head Of Guides: I dont remember exactly the reason on that particular days, .but when i skipped a spot usually because i've check the forecast and see the water&wind will be rough in the afternoon.
Few other occasion was when in the peak season few weeks ago, big traffic jam so skipped to make sure we wont going back to sanur too late.
I always communicated with the guests before made the decisions and they all agreed because i insist that their safety is will be main priority.
.... And small info, the guest who complaint about land tour mostly will be asian/indian , they are also who always make things longer in the landtour spot coz 25pictures is not enough for them...
So i will defend my decision for the trip, we cant be 100% follow the itin, and sometimes need to be flexible based on our reading of few variable... Weather, traffic, mood of the guests, and safety precaution.
[13/01/23, 07.37.51] Dani Head Of Guides: Depend on few things, if all the variable is ok, we have enough time for all the scheduled itinerary, but sometimes in reality things can get changed..
Example : a simple snorkling session sometimes can extend for extra 15-20 minutes when we have non swimmer guests, their preparation will take longer, and plus all the spesial 'coaching' session that guide to give to them so everyone not panicked and died in the water, our attention to the rest of the group will be divided.

[18/09/23, 18.22.11] Mario Manager: ЁЯХТ To qualify for a full refund, kindly cancel at least 24 hours before the experience's scheduled start time.
тЭЧ If you cancel within 24 hours of the experience's start time for ANY reason, whether due to health reasons, booking errors, or other unforeseen circumstances, we regret that refunds or rescheduling WONтАЩT be possible.
ЁЯУМ If you've booked this experience through alternative online platforms such as TripAdvisor, Airbnb, or others, please note that ALL changes, cancellations, and refunds must be managed exclusively through the source where your booking was made.
ЁЯФД Changes made within 24 hours of the experience's start time cannot be guaranteed.
ЁЯХР Please note that all cutoff times are determined by the local time of the experience (GMT+8).
ЁЯСе This experience (shared option) has a minimum traveler requirement, and if it's canceled due to not meeting this minimum, we'll offer you an alternative date or experience, or provide a full refund.
ЁЯЪЧ The cars transportation service (pick up and drop off) becomes non-refundable once it has been utilized, even if the tour gets canceled due to inclement weather.
тЫИя╕П Our itinerary during the trip may be subject to alterations due to weather conditions, prioritizing your safety. The final decision regarding any itinerary changes rests with our experienced captain. 
ЁЯМжя╕П This experience is weather-dependent, and in case of cancellation due to poor weather conditions, we'll gladly offer you an alternative date or a full refund*

* When referring to "Poor Weather," it pertains to instances where the Port Authority does not grant permission to commence the tour due to adverse conditions such as big waves or strong winds.

тЪая╕П Please keep in mind that our office is closed after 6 PM, and any transfers or changes must be arranged before this time.

[31/10/23, 23.36.23] Dani Head Of Guides: Selamat malam rekan2 semua.

Seperti kita ketahui atas kinerja luar biasa dari rekan2 smua selama ini, kita sudah berhasil menjadi salah satu operator terbaik di beberapa platform digital  ,tapi tidak ada salahnya untuk terus berusaha meningkatkan kualitas dan performa kita.
Salah satu langkah yang kita mulai  terapkan adalah dengan mengaplikasikan SOP yang sudah kita ujicoba selama beberapa hari terakhir.
Memang masih jauh dari sempurna tapi ini merupakan bentuk nyata usaha improvement kita untuk bisa lebih maju lagi.
Mungkin akan sedikit berat karena ini merupakan hal baru tapi melihat dari progres kecil yang terjadi dalam beberapa hari terakhir ini ,kita yakin bahwa dalam jangka panjang hal ini akan berdampak sangat positif untuk kita semua.

Di bawah nanti akan saya lampirkan link ke SOP yang telah sedikit di rubah atas masukan dari rekan2 semua,di harapkan per tanggal 1 november besok semua bisa mengaplikasikan SOP ini sambil kita terus berbenah dan improve.
Selain itu juga sengaja dishare agar bisa diakses kapan saja dan bisa menjadi reminder jika dibutuhkan.

Terimakasih untuk semua kinerja luar biasa selama ini dan seperti biasa jika ada masukan ,ide dan saran ,jangan ragu untuk di sampaikan.

ЁЯЩПЁЯЩПЁЯЩПЁЯШКЁЯЩПЁЯЩПЁЯЩП

[22/03/24, 15.22.33] Alex: We're Hiring: *Head of Boat Operations*

Where? Bali, Indonesia

Type Full-Time

About Us:

Day Trip Bali makes your boat trips unforgettable. We go from Bali to the beautiful waters of Nusa Penida on our private speedboats and yachts. Guests get to swim with manta rays and see lots of colorful fish while snorkeling. We love making our guests happy and safe.

The Job:

We need a Head of Boat Operations to lead our boat trips. You'll make sure our tours are fun, safe, and well-organized. This job is all about leading a team, taking care of our boats, and helping us create amazing tours.

What You'll Do:

Oversee the daily operations of our fleet, including scheduling, maintenance, and compliance with maritime regulations.

Lead, train, and inspire a team of captains and crew members to deliver exceptional guest experiences.

Implement and monitor safety protocols to ensure the wellbeing of guests and staff at all times.

Collaborate with the marketing and customer service teams to enhance tour offerings and guest satisfaction.

Manage budgeting for operational expenses, including fuel, maintenance, and crew wages.

What's In It For You:

Good pay and benefits.
A chance to grow in your career.
Work in a fun and supportive place.
Be part of a team that loves the ocean and adventures.

Who We're Looking For:

Someone with experience in running boat operations.
A good leader who works well with others.
Knows about boat safety and rules.
Organized and solves problems well.

Join Our Team:

Ready to lead our boat trips? Send your resume and a short note on why you're a great fit to the email sales@baliboat.tours

Day Trip Bali welcomes everyone. We're all about including different kinds of people in our team.

[30/04/24, 08.18.09] I Wayan Leo Guide From Wahoo: Yth. Peserta Pelatihan DAN Safety Training, 

Pelatihan ini diutamakan bagi para pekerja selam aktif yang berhubungan langsung dengan tamu snorkeling dan diving seperti: dive guide (non-pro), snorkeling guide, captain, boatmen, ABK, dive helper, dive porter, transport driver, dive crew, dive center crew dan semua pihak yang terlibat langsung menangani tamu diving/snorkeling.

Pelatihan akan dibawakan dalam Bahasa Indonesia dan akan dilakukan oleh instruktur PADI dan NAUI. Peserta diwajibkan melakukan registrasi dan mengikuti pelatihan sampai dengan selesai. 

Salam,
Bayu Wardoyo
DAN Indonesia

[22/10/24, 13.26.51] KarimT: Hi Team, important one тА╝я╕ПWe had a case few days ago with boat departing late at 8:20, but also arriving too early at 16:30. As a result customers complaining that total tour was 1 hour less than itinerary and had to be refunded. Moreover, return time checked-in by the guides was 17:00, whereby actual is 16:30 as per other data. 

It's only you who are responsible for managing timing once the boat sets sail. *If you depart late for any reason, please, give customers more time to snorkel at each spot. Your return time should not be earlier than late departure + total tour time unless the whole group decides to return early or there any other solid reasons* ЁЯЩПЁЯП╝ 

Let's all stick to a Japanese Kaizen concept whereby we all, at all levels and in everything we do try to continuously improve a quality we deliver, tiny bit day by day perfection. Thanks a have┬аa┬аgood┬аweek.

[10/12/25, 16.01.11] KarimT: Hi Team! Following Alex's message from last week, I'd like to add that we're having the worst November and most likely December too in the last three years, with the new bookings dropping more than x2 compared to November 2024 which is more that we've planned and forecasted. You can see it yourself by the number of trips/boats we have each day now. This is happening not only to us, but to other tours, experiences and attractions too, due to number of reasons such as negative publicity around Bali as a destination in general around the world (protests, floodings, capsized boats), weather and rain season that is expected to be the worst this year due to тАЬla ninaтАЭ phenomenon, and more frequent reviews from travel bloggers calling Bali overrated with a lot of overdevelopment, overtourism and gila traffic.

However, weтАЩll keep a total of 20 jt. bonus pool for the reviews and surveys. This monthly pool is to be distributed based on pro-rata number of reviews, pak @тБиGee Guide Boss DTBтБй  to update us on the November results. WeтАЩll keep this pool till the end of low season, e.g. end of March, then back to normal. Thanks and keep up the good work on getting reviews after your trips ЁЯЩПЁЯП╝

WeтАЩve also printed A5 leaflets with the QR-code link to the survey, already in Serangan office, that pak @тБиGee Guide Boss DTBтБй  will distribute to you. Please, hand them in to customers at the end of the trip. These surveys really help us understand our current customers, their segmentation, brand awareness, decision factors, and much more. 

Again, thanks a lot for all your work and loyalty. LetтАЩs wish us all more good weather days and low season to end sooner ЁЯНА тАО<This message was edited>

[10/12/25, 16.41.28] Gee Guide Boss DTB: ЁЯФ╡ *Bonus Update тАФ Please Read*

For November, the total Review Bonus has been set at IDR 20,000,000, and it will be distributed pro-rated based on each personтАЩs total number of reviews.

What this means:
тЮбя╕П The bonus is not a fixed amount per review.
тЮбя╕П Instead, the 20 million budget is divided proportionally according to everyoneтАЩs contribution.
тЮбя╕П Since the team produced 295 reviews in total, each personтАЩs bonus will be calculated based on their share of those 295 reviews.

Thank you once again for your effort, consistency, and hard work! ЁЯЩПЁЯФе тАО<This message was edited>
